creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
The Dubai Balloon at Atlantis, one of Dubai’s most unique views 🎈

Soar up to 225 meters above Palm Jumeirah and take in breathtaking views of Atlantis The Royal, Burj Khalifa and the entire Dubai skyline 🌆

Flights start from 195 AED per person and last around 10 minutes, the perfect golden hour or nighttime experience ✨

📍Located next to Atlantis, The Palm
🎟️ Tickets via @thedubaiballoon
